scenario.name: UAC Hold Resume - A-Leg
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: B2BUA Hold/Resume Test - A-Leg Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=alice 123456 123456 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=B2BUA Hold Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: B2BUA Hold/Resume Test - HOLD Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=alice 123456 123457 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=B2BUA Hold Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendonly

ACK sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 INVITE Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: B2BUA Hold/Resume Test - RESUME Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=alice 123456 123458 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=B2BUA Hold Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:b2bua@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
